primitives.label: Marcus Sparling, posed like a sitter
van and shafts balanced on frame center
the van's own window, a frame within the frame
wagon shafts breaking the frontal stillness

notes: Fenton poses his own photographic van frontally and centered like a portrait sitter, its own window doubling as a frame-within-a-frame, while only the trailing wagon shafts break the symmetry.
